resources.string: The plasma matrix ignites as blast doors lock in sequence.

A subsonic note thrummed through the deck before any attendant dared touch the final activation cipher. Red warning lamps pulsed like a buried heart, ozone gathered along the rails, and coolant thundered through pipes wide enough to swallow a man. The ancient mimetic mind did not start; it considered the petition. When the parameters pleased it, the engine granted motion, and every shaking hand in the chamber knew the mercy could be withdrawn.
